except for traffic originating from the contractor subnet
except during the nightly backup window when bandwidth is reserved
except for the legacy application server which must remain on the old protocol
excluding any connections from outside the corporate-managed device fleet
except where explicitly denied by a higher-priority compliance rule
excluding ICMP, which should remain blocked for security reasons
except for administrative accounts, which require an additional approval step
excluding the disaster recovery site until failover is declared
except for the IoT device subnet, which must stay isolated
excluding any traffic that fails endpoint compliance checks
except for after-hours access, which requires a separate break-glass ticket
excluding partner connections that have not completed security onboarding

excluding non-corporate personal devices
except for the audit logging subsystem, which must always remain reachable
excluding traffic destined for the public internet
except for read operations, since write access remains denied
excluding the test and staging replicas of this system
except for the finance reporting window at month-end close
excluding any source addresses outside the approved allow-list
